parts.text:
let's add in a config reload button that can reload the config if someone makes live changes. 

for example -- i just added in openrouter to my config, and added in my api key while hchat was running. but now, i have to close and relaunch hchat for it to pick it up

**Examining the Architecture**

I'm currently focused on the existing `hChat` architecture to pinpoint the best way to implement a "reload config" function. I'm looking at how the configuration file is currently accessed and managed, specifically identifying the modules and classes involved in loading the config. This will help me determine where to inject the reload functionality.


**Analyzing Config Loading**

I've been poring over `src/config.rs` to fully grasp how the configuration is loaded and managed. I'm focusing on the `Config` struct and the `load` function, seeking to understand the mechanisms for file access and parsing. This knowledge is crucial for creating a robust reload function that correctly updates the application's configuration.


**Reviewing Code Structure**

I'm now diving into the code, with `src/config.rs` and `src/app.rs` open. I'm looking for the instantiation of the `Config` struct within the `ChatApp` struct to see how and where the configuration data is stored, and pinpointing the best location to insert the reload trigger. I am also looking at the existing UI structure, to place the reload button for maximum usability.

10: pub struct ChatApp {
11:     messages: Vec<Message>,
12:     input: String,
13:     base_url: String,
14:     models: Vec<String>,
15:     selected_model: usize,
16:     streaming: bool,
17:     rx: Option<mpsc::UnboundedReceiver<StreamEvent>>,
18:     /// Separate channel for model fetching so it doesn't conflict with chat streaming
19:     models_rx: Option<mpsc::UnboundedReceiver<StreamEvent>>,
20:     cancel_token: Option<CancellationToken>,
21:     runtime: tokio::runtime::Runtime,
22:     models_loading: bool,
23:     error: Option<String>,
24:     system_prompt: String,
25:     temperature: f32,
26:     max_tokens: u32,

30:     editing_message: Option<usize>,
31:     edit_buffer: String,
32:     show_settings: bool,
33:     // Persistence
34:     storage: Storage,
35:     current_conversation_id: Option<i64>,
36:     conversation_list: Vec<(i64, String)>,
37:     show_sidebar: bool,
38:     // Search
39:     search_query: String,
40:     search_results: Vec<(i64, String, String)>,
41:     show_search: bool,
42:     // Endpoints
43:     saved_endpoints: Vec<Endpoint>,
44:     show_endpoints: bool,
45:     new_endpoint: String,
46:     new_endpoint_key: String,
47:     // Token usage
48:     last_usage: Option<Usage>,

56: impl ChatApp {
57:     pub fn new(cc: &eframe::CreationContext<'_>, config: Config) -> Self {
58:         configure_fonts(&cc.egui_ctx, &config);
59:         apply_theme(&cc.egui_ctx, config.dark_mode);
60:         cc.egui_ctx.set_pixels_per_point(config.ui_scale);
61: 
62:         let runtime = tokio::runtime::Runtime::new().expect("Failed to create tokio runtime");
63:         let storage = Storage::new();
64:         let conversation_list = storage
65:             .list_conversations()
66:             .into_iter()
67:             .map(|c| (c.id, c.title))
68:             .collect();
69: 
70:         let mut app = Self {
71:             messages: Vec::new(),
72:             input: String::new(),
73:             base_url: config.default_endpoint.clone(),
74:             models: Vec::new(),
75:             selected_model: 0,
76:             streaming: false,
77:             rx: None,
78:             models_rx: None,
79:             cancel_token: None,
80:             runtime,
81:             models_loading: true,
82:             error: None,
83:             system_prompt: config.system_prompt.clone(),
84:             temperature: config.temperature,
85:             max_tokens: config.max_tokens,
86:             use_max_tokens: config.use_max_tokens,
87:             dark_mode: config.dark_mode,
88:             commonmark_cache: CommonMarkCache::default(),
89:             editing_message: None,
90:             edit_buffer: String::new(),
91:             show_settings: false,
92:             storage,
93:             current_conversation_id: None,
94:             conversation_list,
95:             show_sidebar: true,
96:             search_query: String::new(),
97:             search_results: Vec::new(),
98:             show_search: false,
99:             saved_endpoints: config.saved_endpoints.clone(),
100:             show_endpoints: false,
101:             new_endpoint: String::new(),
102:             new_endpoint_key: String::new(),
103:             last_usage: None,
104:             renaming_conversation: None,
105:             rename_buffer: String::new(),
106:             config,
107:         };
108: 
109:         app.fetch_models();
110:         app
111:     }
112: 
113:     fn fetch_models(&mut self) {
114:         let base_url = self.base_url.clone();
115:         let api_key = self.current_api_key().map(|s| s.to_string());
116:         let (tx, rx) = mpsc::unbounded_channel();
117: 
118:         self.runtime.spawn(async move {
119:             match api::fetch_models(&base_url, api_key.as_deref()).await {
120:                 Ok(models) => {
121:                     let _ = tx.send(StreamEvent::ModelsLoaded(models));
122:                 }
123:                 Err(e) => {
124:                     let _ = tx.send(StreamEvent::Error(e));
125:                 }
126:             }
127:             let _ = tx.send(StreamEvent::Done);
128:         });
129: 
130:         self.models_loading = true;
131:         self.models_rx = Some(rx);
132:     }
133: 
134:     fn selected_model_name(&self) -> &str {
135:         self.models
136:             .get(self.selected_model)
137:             .map(|s| s.as_str())
138:             .unwrap_or("(no models)")
139:     }
140: 
141:     fn current_api_key(&self) -> Option<&str> {
142:         self.saved_endpoints
143:             .iter()
144:             .find(|ep| ep.url == self.base_url)
145:             .and_then(|ep| ep.api_key.as_deref())
146:     }
147: 
148:     fn new_conversation(&mut self) {
149:         if self.streaming {
150:             self.stop_streaming();
151:         }
152:         self.save_current();
153:         self.messages.clear();
154:         self.current_conversation_id = None;
155:         self.error = None;
156:         self.last_usage = None;
157:     }
158: 
159:     fn save_current(&mut self) {
160:         if self.messages.is_empty() {
161:             return;
162:         }
163: 
164:         match self.current_conversation_id {
165:             Some(id) => {
166:                 self.storage.save_messages(id, &self.messages);
167:             }
168:             None => {
169:                 let title = self
170:                     .messages
171:                     .iter()
172:                     .find(|m| m.role == Role::User)
173:                     .map(|m| {
174:                         let t = m.content.trim();
175:                         if t.len() > 50 {
176:                             // Find a char boundary for truncation
177:                             let end = t
178:                                 .char_indices()
179:                                 .take_while(|(i, _)| *i <= 47)
180:                                 .last()
181:                                 .map(|(i, c)| i + c.len_utf8())
182:                                 .unwrap_or(47);
183:                             format!("{}...", &t[..end])
184:                         } else {
185:                             t.to_string()
186:                         }
187:                     })
188:                     .unwrap_or_else(|| "New chat".to_string());
189: 
190:                 let id = self.storage.create_conversation(&title);
191:                 self.storage.save_messages(id, &self.messages);
192:                 self.current_conversation_id = Some(id);
193:             }
194:         };
195: 
196:         self.refresh_conversation_list();
197:     }
198: 
199:     fn load_conversation(&mut self, id: i64) {
200:         if self.streaming {
201:             self.stop_streaming();
202:         }
203:         self.save_current();
204:         self.messages = self.storage.load_messages(id);
205:         self.current_conversation_id = Some(id);
206:         self.error = None;
207:         self.last_usage = None;
208:         self.editing_message = None;
209:         self.edit_buffer.clear();
210:     }
211: 
212:     fn delete_conversation(&mut self, id: i64) {
213:         self.storage.delete_conversation(id);
214:         if self.current_conversation_id == Some(id) {
215:             if self.streaming {
216:                 self.stop_streaming();
217:             }
218:             self.messages.clear();
219:             self.current_conversation_id = None;
220:             self.editing_message = None;
221:             self.edit_buffer.clear();
222:         }
223:         self.refresh_conversation_list();
224:     }
225: 
226:     fn refresh_conversation_list(&mut self) {
227:         self.conversation_list = self
228:             .storage
229:             .list_conversations()
230:             .into_iter()
231:             .map(|c| (c.id, c.title))
232:             .collect();
233:     }
234: 
235:     fn send_message(&mut self) {
236:         let content = self.input.trim().to_string();
237:         if content.is_empty() || self.streaming || self.models.is_empty() {
238:             return;
239:         }
240: 
241:         self.input.clear();
242:         self.error = None;
243: 
244:         self.messages.push(Message {
245:             role: Role::User,
246:             content,
247:         });
248: 
249:         self.start_streaming();
250:     }
251: 
252:     fn start_streaming(&mut self) {
253:         if self.models.is_empty() {
254:             self.error = Some("No models available".to_string());
255:             return;
256:         }
257: 
258:         self.messages.push(Message {
259:             role: Role::Assistant,
260:             content: String::new(),
261:         });
262: 
263:         let (tx, rx) = mpsc::unbounded_channel();
264:         let cancel = CancellationToken::new();
265:         self.rx = Some(rx);
266:         self.cancel_token = Some(cancel.clone());
267:         self.streaming = true;
268:         self.last_usage = None;
269: 
270:         // Clamp selected_model to valid range (saturating_sub avoids underflow on empty vec)
271:         self.selected_model = self.selected_model.min(self.models.len().saturating_sub(1));
272:         let model = self.models[self.selected_model].clone();
273:         let base_url = self.base_url.clone();
274: 
275:         let mut messages: Vec<Message> = Vec::new();
276:         if !self.system_prompt.trim().is_empty() {
277:             messages.push(Message {
278:                 role: Role::System,
279:                 content: self.system_prompt.clone(),
280:             });
281:         }
282:         // All messages except the empty assistant one we just added
283:         messages.extend_from_slice(&self.messages[..self.messages.len() - 1]);
284: 
285:         let temperature = Some(self.temperature);
286:         let max_tokens = if self.use_max_tokens {
287:             Some(self.max_tokens)
288:         } else {
289:             None
290:         };
291: 
292:         let api_key = self.current_api_key().map(|s| s.to_string());
293: 
294:         let params = ChatParams {
295:             base_url,
296:             model,
297:             messages,
298:             temperature,
299:             max_tokens,
300:             api_key,
301:         };
302:         self.runtime.spawn(async move {
303:             api::stream_chat(params, tx, cancel)
304:         });
305:     }
306: 
307:     fn stop_streaming(&mut self) {
308:         if let Some(cancel) = self.cancel_token.take() {
309:             cancel.cancel();
310:         }
311:         self.streaming = false;
312:         self.rx = None;
313:         if let Some(last) = self.messages.last()
314:             && last.role == Role::Assistant && last.content.is_empty() {
315:                 self.messages.pop();
316:             }
317:     }
318: 
319:     fn regenerate(&mut self) {
320:         if self.streaming || self.models.is_empty() {
321:             return;
322:         }
323:         if let Some(last) = self.messages.last()
324:             && last.role == Role::Assistant {
325:                 self.messages.pop();
326:                 self.start_streaming();
327:             }
328:     }
329: 
330:     fn edit_and_resend(&mut self, index: usize) {
331:         if self.streaming || index >= self.messages.len() {
332:             return;
333:         }
334:         let content = self.edit_buffer.trim().to_string();
335:         if content.is_empty() {
336:             return;
337:         }
338: 
339:         self.messages[index].content = content;
340:         self.messages.truncate(index + 1);
341:         self.editing_message = None;
342:         self.edit_buffer.clear();
343: 
344:         self.start_streaming();
345:     }
346: 
347:     fn copy_to_clipboard(&self, text: &str) {
348:         if let Ok(mut clipboard) = arboard::Clipboard::new() {
349:             let _ = clipboard.set_text(text);
350:         }
351:     }
352: 
353:     fn process_events(&mut self) {
354:         // Process model fetch events (separate channel)
355:         if let Some(rx) = &mut self.models_rx {
356:             while let Ok(event) = rx.try_recv() {
357:                 match event {
358:                     StreamEvent::ModelsLoaded(models) => {
359:                         if !models.is_empty() {
360:                             self.models = models;
361:                             self.selected_model =
362:                                 self.selected_model.min(self.models.len().saturating_sub(1));
363:                         }
364:                     }
365:                     StreamEvent::Done => {
366:                         self.models_loading = false;
367:                         self.models_rx = None;
368:                         break;
369:                     }
370:                     StreamEvent::Error(e) => {
371:                         self.error = Some(e);
372:                         self.models_loading = false;
373:                         self.models_rx = None;
374:                         break;
375:                     }
376:                     _ => {}
377:                 }
378:             }
379:         }
380: 
381:         // Process chat stream events
382:         let mut just_finished_streaming = false;
383: 
384:         if let Some(rx) = &mut self.rx {
385:             while let Ok(event) = rx.try_recv() {
386:                 match event {
387:                     StreamEvent::Token(token) => {
388:                         if let Some(last) = self.messages.last_mut()
389:                             && last.role == Role::Assistant {
390:                                 last.content.push_str(&token);
391:                             }
392:                     }
393:                     StreamEvent::UsageInfo(usage) => {
394:                         self.last_usage = Some(usage);
395:                     }
396:                     StreamEvent::Done => {
397:                         just_finished_streaming = true;
398:                         self.streaming = false;
399:                         self.cancel_token = None;
400:                         self.rx = None;
401:                         break;
402:                     }
403:                     StreamEvent::Error(e) => {
404:                         self.error = Some(e);
405:                         self.streaming = false;
406:                         self.cancel_token = None;
407:                         self.rx = None;
408:                         if let Some(last) = self.messages.last()
409:                             && last.role == Role::Assistant && last.content.is_empty() {
410:                                 self.messages.pop();
411:                             }
412:                         break;
413:                     }
414:                     _ => {}
415:                 }
416:             }
417:         }
418: 
419:         if just_finished_streaming && !self.messages.is_empty() {
420:             self.save_current();
421:         }
422:     }
423: }

425: fn configure_fonts(ctx: &egui::Context, config: &Config) {
426:     load_custom_fonts(ctx, config);
427: 
428:     let mut style = (*ctx.global_style()).clone();
429:     style.text_styles.insert(
430:         egui::TextStyle::Body,
431:         egui::FontId::new(config.font_size, egui::FontFamily::Proportional),
432:     );
433:     style.text_styles.insert(
434:         egui::TextStyle::Monospace,
435:         egui::FontId::new(config.mono_font_size, egui::FontFamily::Monospace),
436:     );
437:     ctx.set_global_style(style);
438: }
439: 
440: fn load_custom_fonts(ctx: &egui::Context, config: &Config) {
441:     use font_kit::source::SystemSource;
442: 
443:     let mut fonts = egui::FontDefinitions::default();
444:     let source = SystemSource::new();
445: 
446:     if !config.font_family.is_empty() {
447:         if let Some(data) = lookup_font(&source, &config.font_family) {
448:             fonts
449:                 .font_data
450:                 .insert("custom_proportional".to_owned(), data.into());
451:             if let Some(family) = fonts.families.get_mut(&egui::FontFamily::Proportional) {
452:                 family.insert(0, "custom_proportional".to_owned());
453:             }
454:         } else {
455:             eprintln!("Warning: font '{}' not found, using default", config.font_family);
456:         }
457:     }
458: 
459:     if !config.mono_font_family.is_empty() {
460:         if let Some(data) = lookup_font(&source, &config.mono_font_family) {
461:             fonts
462:                 .font_data
463:                 .insert("custom_monospace".to_owned(), data.into());
464:             if let Some(family) = fonts.families.get_mut(&egui::FontFamily::Monospace) {
465:                 family.insert(0, "custom_monospace".to_owned());
466:             }
467:         } else {
468:             eprintln!("Warning: font '{}' not found, using default", config.mono_font_family);
469:         }
470:     }
471: 
472:     ctx.set_fonts(fonts);
473: }
474: 
475: fn lookup_font(
476:     source: &font_kit::source::SystemSource,
477:     name: &str,
478: ) -> Option<egui::FontData> {
479:     use font_kit::family_name::FamilyName;
480:     use font_kit::properties::Properties;
481: 
482:     let handle = source
483:         .select_best_match(&[FamilyName::Title(name.to_string())], &Properties::new())
484:         .ok()?;
485:     let font = handle.load().ok()?;
486:     let data = font.copy_font_data()?;
487:     Some(egui::FontData::from_owned((*data).clone()))
488: }
489: 
490: fn apply_theme(ctx: &egui::Context, dark: bool) {
491:     if dark {
492:         ctx.set_visuals(egui::Visuals::dark());
493:     } else {
494:         ctx.set_visuals(egui::Visuals::light());
495:     }
496: }

498: impl eframe::App for ChatApp {
499:     fn ui(&mut self, ui: &mut egui::Ui, _frame: &mut eframe::Frame) {
500:         let ctx = ui.ctx().clone();
501:         self.process_events();
502: 
503:         if self.streaming || self.models_loading {
504:             ctx.request_repaint();
505:         }
506: 
507:         // Keyboard shortcuts
508:         let new_chat = ui.input(|i| {
509:             i.key_pressed(egui::Key::N) && (i.modifiers.ctrl || i.modifiers.command)
510:         });
511:         if new_chat {
512:             self.new_conversation();
513:         }
514: 
515:         // Top bar
516:         egui::Panel::top("top_bar").show_inside(ui, |ui| {
517:             ui.horizontal(|ui| {
518:                 let sidebar_icon = if self.show_sidebar { "◀" } else { "▶" };
519:                 if ui.button(sidebar_icon).on_hover_text("Toggle sidebar").clicked() {
520:                     self.show_sidebar = !self.show_sidebar;
521:                 }
522: 
523:                 ui.separator();
524:                 ui.label("Model:");
525:                 egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("model_selector")
526:                     .selected_text(self.selected_model_name())
527:                     .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
528:                         for (i, model) in self.models.iter().enumerate() {
529:                             ui.selectable_value(&mut self.selected_model, i, model);
530:                         }
531:                     });
532: 
533:                 ui.separator();
534:                 ui.label("Endpoint:");
535: 
536:                 if self.saved_endpoints.len() > 1 {
537:                     let mut new_url = None;
538:                     egui::ComboBox::from_id_salt("endpoint_selector")
539:                         .selected_text(&self.base_url)
540:                         .width(200.0)
541:                         .show_ui(ui, |ui| {
542:                             for ep in &self.saved_endpoints {
543:                                 if ui.selectable_label(self.base_url == ep.url, &ep.url).clicked() {
544:                                     new_url = Some(ep.url.clone());
545:                                 }
546:                             }
547:                         });
548:                     if let Some(url) = new_url {
549:                         self.base_url = url;
550:                         if !self.streaming {
551:                             self.fetch_models();
552:                         }
553:                     }
554:                 } else {
555:                     ui.add(egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.base_url).desired_width(200.0));
556:                 }
557: 
558:                 if ui
559:                     .add_enabled(!self.streaming, egui::Button::new("↻"))
560:                     .on_hover_text("Refresh models")
561:                     .clicked()
562:                 {
563:                     self.fetch_models();
564:                 }
565: 
566:                 if ui.button("+").on_hover_text("Manage endpoints").clicked() {
567:                     self.show_endpoints = !self.show_endpoints;
568:                 }
569: 
570:                 ui.separator();
571: 
572:                 let settings_label = if self.show_settings { "⚙ ▼" } else { "⚙" };
573:                 if ui.button(settings_label).on_hover_text("Settings").clicked() {
574:                     self.show_settings = !self.show_settings;
575:                 }
576: 
577:                 let theme_icon = if self.dark_mode { "☀" } else { "🌙" };
578:                 if ui
579:                     .button(theme_icon)
580:                     .on_hover_text("Toggle theme")
581:                     .clicked()
582:                 {
583:                     self.dark_mode = !self.dark_mode;
584:                     self.config.dark_mode = self.dark_mode;
585:                     apply_theme(&ctx, self.dark_mode);
586:                 }
587:             });
588: 
589:             // Endpoints manager
590:             if self.show_endpoints {
591:                 ui.separator();
592:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
593:                     ui.label("Add endpoint:");
594:                     ui.add(
595:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.new_endpoint)
596:                             .hint_text("http://localhost:8080/v1")
597:                             .desired_width(250.0),
598:                     );
599:                     ui.label("API key:");
600:                     ui.add(
601:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.new_endpoint_key)
602:                             .hint_text("(optional)")
603:                             .password(true)
604:                             .desired_width(150.0),
605:                     );
606:                     if ui.button("Add").clicked() && !self.new_endpoint.trim().is_empty() {
607:                         let url = self.new_endpoint.trim().to_string();
608:                         let api_key = if self.new_endpoint_key.trim().is_empty() {
609:                             None
610:                         } else {
611:                             Some(self.new_endpoint_key.trim().to_string())
612:                         };
613:                         if !self.saved_endpoints.iter().any(|ep| ep.url == url) {
614:                             self.saved_endpoints.push(Endpoint { url, api_key });
615:                         }
616:                         self.new_endpoint.clear();
617:                         self.new_endpoint_key.clear();
618:                     }
619:                 });
620:                 let mut to_remove = None;
621:                 let mut key_edit: Option<(usize, Option<String>)> = None;
622:                 for (i, ep) in self.saved_endpoints.iter().enumerate() {
623:                     ui.horizontal(|ui| {
624:                         ui.label(&ep.url);
625:                         let key_icon = if ep.api_key.is_some() { "🔑" } else { "🔒" };
626:                         let tooltip = if ep.api_key.is_some() {
627:                             "API key set — click to clear"
628:                         } else {
629:                             "No API key"
630:                         };
631:                         if ui.small_button(key_icon).on_hover_text(tooltip).clicked()
632:                             && ep.api_key.is_some()
633:                         {
634:                             key_edit = Some((i, None));
635:                         }
636:                         if self.saved_endpoints.len() > 1 && ui.small_button("✕").clicked() {
637:                             to_remove = Some(i);
638:                         }
639:                     });
640:                 }
641:                 if let Some((i, new_key)) = key_edit {
642:                     self.saved_endpoints[i].api_key = new_key;
643:                 }
644:                 if let Some(i) = to_remove {
645:                     let removed = self.saved_endpoints.remove(i);
646:                     if self.base_url == removed.url {
647:                         if let Some(first) = self.saved_endpoints.first() {
648:                             self.base_url = first.url.clone();
649:                         }
650:                         if !self.streaming {
651:                             self.fetch_models();
652:                         }
653:                     }
654:                 }
655:             }
656: 
657:             // Collapsible settings panel
658:             if self.show_settings {
659:                 ui.separator();
660:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
661:                     ui.label("System prompt:");
662:                 });
663:                 ui.add(
664:                     egui::TextEdit::multiline(&mut self.system_prompt)
665:                         .hint_text("You are a helpful assistant...")
666:                         .desired_rows(2)
667:                         .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
668:                 );
669:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
670:                     ui.label("Temperature:");
671:                     ui.add(egui::Slider::new(&mut self.temperature, 0.0..=2.0).step_by(0.1));
672:                     ui.separator();
673:                     ui.checkbox(&mut self.use_max_tokens, "Max tokens:");
674:                     ui.add_enabled(

677:                     );
678:                 });
679: 
680:                 ui.separator();
681:                 let mut fonts_changed = false;
682:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
683:                     ui.label("Font:");
684:                     ui.add(
685:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.config.font_family)
686:                             .hint_text("default")
687:                             .desired_width(120.0),
688:                     );
689:                     ui.label("Size:");
690:                     if ui
691:                         .add(egui::Slider::new(&mut self.config.font_size, 8.0..=24.0).step_by(1.0))
692:                         .changed()
693:                     {
694:                         fonts_changed = true;
695:                     }
696:                 });
697:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
698:                     ui.label("Mono:");
699:                     ui.add(
700:                         egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.config.mono_font_family)
701:                             .hint_text("default")
702:                             .desired_width(120.0),
703:                     );
704:                     ui.label("Size:");
705:                     if ui
706:                         .add(egui::Slider::new(&mut self.config.mono_font_size, 8.0..=24.0).step_by(1.0))
707:                         .changed()
708:                     {
709:                         fonts_changed = true;
710:                     }
711:                 });
712:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
713:                     ui.label("UI scale:");
714:                     if ui
715:                         .add(egui::Slider::new(&mut self.config.ui_scale, 0.75..=2.0).step_by(0.05))
716:                         .changed()
717:                     {
718:                         ctx.set_pixels_per_point(self.config.ui_scale);
719:                     }
720:                 });
721:                 if fonts_changed {
722:                     configure_fonts(&ctx, &self.config);
723:                 }
724: 
725:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
726:                     if ui.button("Save settings").clicked() {
727:                         self.config.dark_mode = self.dark_mode;
728:                         self.config.default_endpoint = self.base_url.clone();
729:                         self.config.system_prompt = self.system_prompt.clone();
730:                         self.config.temperature = self.temperature;
731:                         self.config.max_tokens = self.max_tokens;
732:                         self.config.use_max_tokens = self.use_max_tokens;
733:                         self.config.saved_endpoints = self.saved_endpoints.clone();
734:                         if let Err(e) = self.config.save() {
735:                             self.error = Some(format!("Failed to save settings: {e}"));
736:                         }
737:                     }
738:                     if ui.button("Reset to defaults").clicked() {
739:                         self.config = Config::default();
740:                         self.dark_mode = self.config.dark_mode;
741:                         self.base_url = self.config.default_endpoint.clone();
742:                         self.system_prompt = self.config.system_prompt.clone();
743:                         self.temperature = self.config.temperature;
744:                         self.max_tokens = self.config.max_tokens;
745:                         self.use_max_tokens = self.config.use_max_tokens;
746:                         self.saved_endpoints = self.config.saved_endpoints.clone();
747:                         configure_fonts(&ctx, &self.config);
748:                         ctx.set_pixels_per_point(self.config.ui_scale);
749:                         apply_theme(&ctx, self.config.dark_mode);
750:                         if let Err(e) = self.config.save() {
751:                             self.error = Some(format!("Failed to save settings: {e}"));
752:                         }
753:                         self.fetch_models();
754:                     }
755:                 });
756:             }
757:         });
758: 
759:         // Bottom input panel
760:         egui::Panel::bottom("input_panel").show_inside(ui, |ui| {
761:             if let Some(err) = &self.error {
762:                 ui.colored_label(egui::Color32::RED, format!("Error: {err}"));
763:             }
764: 
765:             let enter_pressed = ui.input(|i| i.key_pressed(egui::Key::Enter));
766:             let shift_held = ui.input(|i| i.modifiers.shift);
767: 
768:             ui.horizontal(|ui| {
769:                 let response = ui.add_sized(
770:                     [ui.available_width() - 60.0, 35.0],
771:                     egui::TextEdit::multiline(&mut self.input)
772:                         .hint_text("Type a message... (Shift+Enter for newline)")
773:                         .desired_rows(1),
774:                 );
775: 
776:                 if enter_pressed && response.has_focus() {
777:                     if shift_held {
778:                         self.input.push('\n');
779:                     } else {
780:                         if self.input.ends_with('\n') {
781:                             self.input.pop();
782:                         }
783:                         self.send_message();
784:                     }
785:                 }
786: 
787:                 if self.streaming {
788:                     if ui.button("■ Stop").clicked() {
789:                         self.stop_streaming();
790:                     }
791:                 } else {
792:                     let send_enabled = !self.input.trim().is_empty() && !self.models.is_empty();
793:                     if ui
794:                         .add_enabled(send_enabled, egui::Button::new("Send"))
795:                         .clicked()
796:                     {
797:                         self.send_message();
798:                         response.request_focus();
799:                     }
800:                 }
801:             });
802: 
803:             ui.horizontal(|ui| {
804:                 if self.streaming {
805:                     ui.spinner();
806:                 }
807:                 if let Some(usage) = &self.last_usage {
808:                     let parts: Vec<String> = [
809:                         usage.prompt_tokens.map(|t| format!("prompt: {t}")),
810:                         usage.completion_tokens.map(|t| format!("completion: {t}")),
811:                         usage.total_tokens.map(|t| format!("total: {t}")),
812:                     ]
813:                     .into_iter()
814:                     .flatten()
815:                     .collect();
816:                     if !parts.is_empty() {
817:                         ui.with_layout(egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center), |ui| {
818:                             ui.weak(parts.join(" | "));
819:                         });
820:                     }
821:                 }
822:             });
823:         });
824: 
825:         // Sidebar
826:         if self.show_sidebar {
827:             egui::Panel::left("sidebar").default_size(200.0).show_inside(ui, |ui| {
828:                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
829:                     if ui.button("+ New Chat").clicked() {
830:                         self.new_conversation();
831:                     }
832:                     if ui.button("🔍").on_hover_text("Search").clicked() {
833:                         self.show_search = !self.show_search;
834:                     }
835:                 });
836: 
837:                 if self.show_search {
838:                     ui.separator();
839:                     let search_changed = ui
840:                         .add(
841:                             egui::TextEdit::singleline(&mut self.search_query)
842:                                 .hint_text("Search conversations...")
843:                                 .desired_width(f32::INFINITY),
844:                         )
845:                         .changed();
846: 
847:                     if search_changed {
848:                         if self.search_query.is_empty() {
849:                             self.search_results.clear();
850:                         } else {
851:                             self.search_results = self.storage.search(&self.search_query);
852:                         }
853:                     }
854: 
855:                     if !self.search_query.is_empty() && !self.search_results.is_empty() {
856:                         let mut selected_conv = None;
857:                         for (conv_id, title, snippet) in &self.search_results {
858:                             if ui
859:                                 .button(title.as_str())
860:                                 .on_hover_text(snippet.as_str())
861:                                 .clicked()
862:                             {
863:                                 selected_conv = Some(*conv_id);
864:                             }
865:                         }
866:                         if let Some(conv_id) = selected_conv {
867:                             self.load_conversation(conv_id);
868:                             self.show_search = false;
869:                             self.search_query.clear();
870:                             self.search_results.clear();
871:                         }
872:                     }
873:                 }
874: 
875:                 ui.separator();
876: 
877:                 egui::ScrollArea::vertical().show(ui, |ui| {
878:                     let mut action: Option<SidebarAction> = None;
879: 
880:                     for (id, title) in &self.conversation_list {
881:                         let is_current = self.current_conversation_id == Some(*id);
882: 
883:                         // Inline rename mode
884:                         if self.renaming_conversation == Some(*id) {
885:                             ui.horizontal(|ui| {
886:                                 let resp = ui.text_edit_singleline(&mut self.rename_buffer);
887:                                 if resp.lost_focus()
888:                                     || ui.input(|i| i.key_pressed(egui::Key::Enter))
889:                                 {
890:                                     action = Some(SidebarAction::FinishRename(*id));
891:                                 }
892:                                 if ui.input(|i| i.key_pressed(egui::Key::Escape)) {
893:                                     self.renaming_conversation = None;
894:                                     self.rename_buffer.clear();
895:                                 }
896:                             });
897:                         } else {
898:                             // Kebab menu pinned right, title fills remaining space
899:                             let row_height = ui.spacing().interact_size.y;
900:                             let full_width = ui.available_width();
901:                             let (row_rect, _) = ui.allocate_exact_size(
902:                                 egui::vec2(full_width, row_height),
903:                                 egui::Sense::hover(),
904:                             );
905: 
906:                             // Kebab button on the right
907:                             let kebab_width = 20.0;
908:                             let kebab_rect = egui::Rect::from_min_size(
909:                                 egui::pos2(row_rect.right() - kebab_width, row_rect.top()),
910:                                 egui::vec2(kebab_width, row_height),
911:                             );
912:                             let mut kebab_ui = ui.new_child(egui::UiBuilder::new().max_rect(kebab_rect));
913:                             kebab_ui.menu_button("...", |ui| {
914:                                 if ui.button("Rename").clicked() {
915:                                     action = Some(SidebarAction::StartRename(*id));
916:                                     ui.close();
917:                                 }
918:                                 if ui.button("Export").clicked() {
919:                                     action = Some(SidebarAction::Export(*id));
920:                                     ui.close();
921:                                 }
922:                                 if ui.button("Delete").clicked() {
923:                                     action = Some(SidebarAction::Delete(*id));
924:                                     ui.close();
925:                                 }
926:                             });
927: 
928:                             // Title label fills the rest
929:                             let title_rect = egui::Rect::from_min_max(
930:                                 row_rect.min,
931:                                 egui::pos2(row_rect.right() - kebab_width - 4.0, row_rect.bottom()),
932:                             );
933:                             let mut title_ui = ui.new_child(egui::UiBuilder::new().max_rect(title_rect));
934:                             let resp = title_ui.add(
935:                                 egui::Label::new(
936:                                     egui::RichText::new(title.as_str())
937:                                         .color(if is_current {
938:                                             title_ui.visuals().strong_text_color()
939:                                         } else {
940:                                             title_ui.visuals().text_color()
941:                                         }),
942:                                 )
943:                                 .truncate()
944:                                 .selectable(false)
945:                                 .sense(egui::Sense::click()),
946:                             );
947: 
948:                             if resp.clicked() && !is_current {
949:                                 action = Some(SidebarAction::Load(*id));
950:                             }
951: 
952:                             // Right-click context menu
953:                             resp.context_menu(|ui| {
954:                                 if ui.button("Rename").clicked() {
955:                                     action = Some(SidebarAction::StartRename(*id));
956:                                     ui.close();
957:                                 }
958:                                 if ui.button("Export").clicked() {
959:                                     action = Some(SidebarAction::Export(*id));
960:                                     ui.close();
961:                                 }
962:                                 if ui.button("Delete").clicked() {
963:                                     action = Some(SidebarAction::Delete(*id));
964:                                     ui.close();
965:                                 }
966:                             });
967:                         }
968:                         ui.separator();
969:                     }
970: 
971:                     match action {
972:                         Some(SidebarAction::Load(id)) => self.load_conversation(id),
973:                         Some(SidebarAction::Delete(id)) => self.delete_conversation(id),
974:                         Some(SidebarAction::Export(id)) => {
975:                             let md = self.storage.export_markdown(id);
976:                             self.copy_to_clipboard(&md);
977:                         }
978:                         Some(SidebarAction::StartRename(id)) => {
979:                             if let Some((_, title)) = self.conversation_list.iter().find(|(cid, _)| *cid == id) {
980:                                 self.rename_buffer = title.clone();
981:                             }
982:                             self.renaming_conversation = Some(id);
983:                         }
984:                         Some(SidebarAction::FinishRename(id)) => {
985:                             let new_title = self.rename_buffer.trim().to_string();
986:                             if !new_title.is_empty() {
987:                                 self.storage.update_conversation_title(id, &new_title);
988:                                 self.refresh_conversation_list();
989:                             }
990:                             self.renaming_conversation = None;
991:                             self.rename_buffer.clear();
992:                         }
993:                         None => {}
994:                     }
995:                 });
996:             });
997:         }
998: 
999:         // Central message area
1000:         let panel_fill = ui.visuals().panel_fill;
1001:         egui::Frame::new()
1002:             .fill(panel_fill)
1003:             .inner_margin(egui::Margin::symmetric(16, 0))
1004:             .show(ui, |ui| {
1005:         egui::ScrollArea::vertical()
1006:             .auto_shrink([false; 2])
1007:             .stick_to_bottom(true)
1008:             .show(ui, |ui| {
1009:                 if self.messages.is_empty() {
1010:                     ui.vertical_centered(|ui| {
1011:                         ui.add_space(100.0);
1012:                         ui.heading("hChat");
1013:                         ui.label("Lightweight local LLM chat");
1014:                         ui.label("Ctrl+N to start a new conversation");
1015:                     });
1016:                     return;
1017:                 }
1018: 
1019:                 let mut action: Option<MessageAction> = None;
1020:                 let msg_count = self.messages.len();
1021: 
1022:                 for (i, msg) in self.messages.iter().enumerate() {
1023:                     let (prefix, color) = match msg.role {
1024:                         Role::User => ("You", egui::Color32::from_rgb(100, 180, 255)),
1025:                         Role::Assistant => ("AI", egui::Color32::from_rgb(100, 255, 150)),
1026:                         Role::System => ("System", egui::Color32::GRAY),
1027:                     };
1028: 
1029:                     ui.horizontal(|ui| {
1030:                         ui.colored_label(color, format!("{prefix}:"));
1031:                         ui.with_layout(egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center), |ui| {
1032:                             if ui.small_button("📋").on_hover_text("Copy").clicked() {
1033:                                 action = Some(MessageAction::Copy(i));
1034:                             }
1035:                             if msg.role == Role::User && !self.streaming
1036:                                 && ui.small_button("✏").on_hover_text("Edit").clicked() {
1037:                                     action = Some(MessageAction::StartEdit(i));
1038:                                 }
1039:                             if msg.role == Role::Assistant
1040:                                 && i == msg_count - 1
1041:                                 && !self.streaming
1042:                                 && ui.small_button("🔄").on_hover_text("Regenerate").clicked() {
1043:                                     action = Some(MessageAction::Regenerate);
1044:                                 }
1045:                         });
1046:                     });
1047: 
1048:                     if self.editing_message == Some(i) {
1049:                         ui.add(
1050:                             egui::TextEdit::multiline(&mut self.edit_buffer)
1051:                                 .desired_width(f32::INFINITY)
1052:                                 .desired_rows(3),
1053:                         );
1054:                         ui.horizontal(|ui| {
1055:                             if ui.button("Send").clicked() {
1056:                                 action = Some(MessageAction::FinishEdit(i));
1057:                             }
1058:                             if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {
1059:                                 action = Some(MessageAction::CancelEdit);
1060:                             }
1061:                         });
1062:                     } else if msg.role == Role::Assistant && !msg.content.is_empty() {
1063:                         CommonMarkViewer::new().show(
1064:                             ui,
1065:                             &mut self.commonmark_cache,
1066:                             &msg.content,
1067:                         );
1068:                     } else {
1069:                         ui.label(&msg.content);
1070:                     }
1071: 
1072:                     ui.add_space(8.0);
1073:                     ui.separator();
1074:                 }
1075: 
1076:                 match action {
1077:                     Some(MessageAction::Copy(i)) if i < self.messages.len() => {
1078:                         self.copy_to_clipboard(&self.messages[i].content);
1079:                     }
1080:                     Some(MessageAction::StartEdit(i)) if i < self.messages.len() => {
1081:                         self.edit_buffer = self.messages[i].content.clone();
1082:                         self.editing_message = Some(i);
1083:                     }
1084:                     Some(MessageAction::FinishEdit(i)) => {
1085:                         self.edit_and_resend(i);
1086:                     }
1087:                     Some(MessageAction::CancelEdit) => {
1088:                         self.editing_message = None;
1089:                         self.edit_buffer.clear();
1090:                     }
1091:                     Some(MessageAction::Regenerate) => {
1092:                         self.regenerate();
1093:                     }
1094:                     _ => {}
1095:                 }
1096:             });
1097:         });
1098:     }
1099: }
1100: 
1101: enum MessageAction {
1102:     Copy(usize),
1103:     StartEdit(usize),
1104:     FinishEdit(usize),
1105:     CancelEdit,
1106:     Regenerate,
1107: }
1108: 
1109: enum SidebarAction {
1110:     Load(i64),
1111:     Delete(i64),
1112:     Export(i64),
1113:     StartRename(i64),
1114:     FinishRename(i64),
1115: }

(End of file - total 1115 lines)

Sorry about that! I was deep in the weeds scanning through the `app.rs` file to figure out where the `eframe::App` trait was implemented and making sure I didn't break any of the UI layout or streaming logic while inserting the button.

I've just added a new `⟳` (Reload config) button to the top bar right next to your `⚙` settings gear. 

When clicked, it calls a new `reload_config` method which will:
1. Re-read the config file from disk.
2. Hot-swap the fonts, UI scale, and dark/light theme.
3. Automatically update your saved endpoints (so if you added an OpenRouter API key, it instantly picks it up).
4. Automatically refresh the model list if you added a new active endpoint or key.

You can compile it and it'll be right there at the top! Let me know if you want it moved or tweaked.

190:                 let id = self.storage.create_conversation(&title);

285:         let temperature = Some(self.temperature);

355:     fn process_events(&mut self) {

399:                     StreamEvent::Done => {

401:                         self.streaming = false;

403:                         self.rx = None;

409:                         self.cancel_token = None;
410:                         self.rx = None;

413:                             && last.content.is_empty()

416:                         }

424:         if just_finished_streaming && !self.messages.is_empty() {
425:             self.save_current();

429:     pub fn reload_config(&mut self, ctx: &egui::Context) {
430:         let new_config = Config::load();
431: 
432:         // Reload fonts
433:         configure_fonts(ctx, &new_config);
434: 
435:         // Update theme
436:         if self.dark_mode != new_config.dark_mode {
437:             self.dark_mode = new_config.dark_mode;
438:             apply_theme(ctx, self.dark_mode);
439:         }
440: 
441:         // Update UI scale
442:         if (self.config.ui_scale - new_config.ui_scale).abs() > f32::EPSILON {
443:             ctx.set_pixels_per_point(new_config.ui_scale);
444:         }
445: 
446:         // Apply new settings
447:         self.system_prompt = new_config.system_prompt.clone();
448:         self.temperature = new_config.temperature;
449:         self.max_tokens = new_config.max_tokens;
450:         self.use_max_tokens = new_config.use_max_tokens;
451: 
452:         // Update endpoints list
453:         self.saved_endpoints = new_config.saved_endpoints.clone();
454: 
455:         // Check if current endpoint still exists, if not fallback to first
456:         if !self
457:             .saved_endpoints
458:             .iter()
459:             .any(|ep| ep.url == self.base_url)
460:         {
461:             if let Some(first) = self.saved_endpoints.first() {
462:                 self.base_url = first.url.clone();
463:                 if !self.streaming {
464:                     self.fetch_models();
465:                 }
466:             }
467:         } else {
468:             // Also need to re-fetch models if the API key for the current endpoint changed
469:             if !self.streaming {
470:                 self.fetch_models();
471:             }
472:         }
473: 
474:         self.config = new_config;
475:     }
476: }

478: fn configure_fonts(ctx: &egui::Context, config: &Config) {
479:     load_custom_fonts(ctx, config);

481:     let mut style = (*ctx.global_style()).clone();
482:     style.text_styles.insert(
483:         egui::TextStyle::Body,
484:         egui::FontId::new(config.font_size, egui::FontFamily::Proportional),
485:     );
486:     style.text_styles.insert(
487:         egui::TextStyle::Monospace,
488:         egui::FontId::new(config.mono_font_size, egui::FontFamily::Monospace),
489:     );
490:     ctx.set_global_style(style);
491: }
492: 
493: fn load_custom_fonts(ctx: &egui::Context, config: &Config) {
494:     use font_kit::source::SystemSource;
495: 
496:     let mut fonts = egui::FontDefinitions::default();
497:     let source = SystemSource::new();
498: 
499:     if !config.font_family.is_empty() {
500:         if let Some(data) = lookup_font(&source, &config.font_family) {
501:             fonts
502:                 .font_data
503:                 .insert("custom_proportional".to_owned(), data.into());
504:             if let Some(family) = fonts.families.get_mut(&egui::FontFamily::Proportional) {
505:                 family.insert(0, "custom_proportional".to_owned());
506:             }
507:         } else {
508:             eprintln!(
509:                 "Warning: font '{}' not found, using default",
510:                 config.font_family
511:             );
512:         }
513:     }
514: 
515:     if !config.mono_font_family.is_empty() {
516:         if let Some(data) = lookup_font(&source, &config.mono_font_family) {
517:             fonts
518:                 .font_data
519:                 .insert("custom_monospace".to_owned(), data.into());
520:             if let Some(family) = fonts.families.get_mut(&egui::FontFamily::Monospace) {
521:                 family.insert(0, "custom_monospace".to_owned());
522:             }
523:         } else {
524:             eprintln!(
525:                 "Warning: font '{}' not found, using default",
526:                 config.mono_font_family
527:             );
528:         }
529:     }
530: 
531:     ctx.set_fonts(fonts);
532: }
533: 
534: fn lookup_font(source: &font_kit::source::SystemSource, name: &str) -> Option<egui::FontData> {
535:     use font_kit::family_name::FamilyName;
536:     use font_kit::properties::Properties;
537: 
538:     let handle = source
539:         .select_best_match(&[FamilyName::Title(name.to_string())], &Properties::new())
540:         .ok()?;
541:     let font = handle.load().ok()?;
542:     let data = font.copy_font_data()?;
543:     Some(egui::FontData::from_owned((*data).clone()))
544: }

546: fn apply_theme(ctx: &egui::Context, dark: bool) {
547:     if dark {
548:         ctx.set_visuals(egui::Visuals::dark());
549:     } else {
550:         ctx.set_visuals(egui::Visuals::light());
551:     }
552: }

1016:                                 let mut title_ui =

1031:                                 if resp.clicked() && !is_current {

1080:                     });

1084:         // Central message area

1094:                         if self.messages.is_empty() {

1099:                                 ui.label("Ctrl+N to start a new conversation");
1100:                             });
1101:                             return;
1102:                         }
1103: 
1104:                         let mut action: Option<MessageAction> = None;
1105:                         let msg_count = self.messages.len();
1106: 
1107:                         for (i, msg) in self.messages.iter().enumerate() {
1108:                             let (prefix, color) = match msg.role {
1109:                                 Role::User => ("You", egui::Color32::from_rgb(100, 180, 255)),
1110:                                 Role::Assistant => ("AI", egui::Color32::from_rgb(100, 255, 150)),
1111:                                 Role::System => ("System", egui::Color32::GRAY),
1112:                             };
1113: 
1114:                             ui.horizontal(|ui| {
1115:                                 ui.colored_label(color, format!("{prefix}:"));
1116:                                 ui.with_layout(
1117:                                     egui::Layout::right_to_left(egui::Align::Center),
1118:                                     |ui| {
1119:                                         if ui.small_button("📋").on_hover_text("Copy").clicked() {
1120:                                             action = Some(MessageAction::Copy(i));
1121:                                         }
1122:                                         if msg.role == Role::User
1123:                                             && !self.streaming
1124:                                             && ui.small_button("✏").on_hover_text("Edit").clicked()
1125:                                         {
1126:                                             action = Some(MessageAction::StartEdit(i));
1127:                                         }
1128:                                         if msg.role == Role::Assistant
1129:                                             && i == msg_count - 1
1130:                                             && !self.streaming
1131:                                             && ui
1132:                                                 .small_button("🔄")
1133:                                                 .on_hover_text("Regenerate")
1134:                                                 .clicked()
1135:                                         {
1136:                                             action = Some(MessageAction::Regenerate);
1137:                                         }
1138:                                     },
1139:                                 );
1140:                             });
1141: 
1142:                             if self.editing_message == Some(i) {
1143:                                 ui.add(
1144:                                     egui::TextEdit::multiline(&mut self.edit_buffer)
1145:                                         .desired_width(f32::INFINITY)

1148:                                 ui.horizontal(|ui| {
1149:                                     if ui.button("Send").clicked() {
1150:                                         action = Some(MessageAction::FinishEdit(i));
1151:                                     }
1152:                                     if ui.button("Cancel").clicked() {

1155:                                 });
1156:                             } else if msg.role == Role::Assistant && !msg.content.is_empty() {
1157:                                 CommonMarkViewer::new().show(

1160:                                     &msg.content,

1162:                             } else {
1163:                                 ui.label(&msg.content);
1164:                             }
1165: 
1166:                             ui.add_space(8.0);

1169: 
1170:                         match action {
1171:                             Some(MessageAction::Copy(i)) if i < self.messages.len() => {
1172:                                 self.copy_to_clipboard(&self.messages[i].content);
1173:                             }
1174:                             Some(MessageAction::StartEdit(i)) if i < self.messages.len() => {
1175:                                 self.edit_buffer = self.messages[i].content.clone();
1176:                                 self.editing_message = Some(i);

1188:                             _ => {}

1195: enum MessageAction {

1197:     StartEdit(usize),

parts.text:
Ah, that makes way more sense. I just removed the circular `⟳` button from the top bar and added a proper "Reload config" button to the settings panel, right between "Save settings" and "Reset to defaults".

You can recompile with `cargo run` and try it out! Let me know if that's what you were looking for.
